description: 希腊神话中的众神之王。
examples_json: [{"en":"Zeus was the king of the Greek gods.","zh":"宙斯是希腊众神之王。"}]
[{"en":"The gods lived on Mount Olympus.","zh":"众神住在奥林匹斯山上。"}]
[{"en":"Zeus used his thunderbolt to punish the wicked.","zh":"宙斯用他的雷电惩罚恶人。"}]
[{"en":"Poseidon ruled the seas with his trident.","zh":"波塞冬用三叉戟统治海洋。"}]
[{"en":"Athena was the goddess of wisdom and war.","zh":"雅典娜是智慧与战争女神。"}]
[{"en":"The Greek gods were believed to be immortal.","zh":"希腊众神被认为是不朽的。"}]
[{"en":"The Parthenon was a temple dedicated to Athena.","zh":"帕特农神庙是献给雅典娜的神庙。"}]

description: 关于神和英雄的传统故事。
examples_json: [{"en":"Greek myths explain natural phenomena.","zh":"希腊神话解释自然现象。"}]

description: 希腊神话中最著名的英雄。
examples_json: [{"en":"Hercules completed twelve impossible labors.","zh":"赫拉克勒斯完成了十二项不可能的任务。"}]
[{"en":"Every Greek hero had to overcome great challenges.","zh":"每个希腊英雄都必须克服巨大挑战。"}]
[{"en":"The hero had to fight many monsters.","zh":"英雄必须与许多怪物战斗。"}]

description: 神通过祭司传达的预言。
examples_json: [{"en":"The oracle warned the hero of his fate.","zh":"神谕警告英雄他的命运。"}]
[{"en":"Jason went on a quest for the Golden Fleece.","zh":"伊阿宋踏上了寻找金羊毛的征程。"}]

description: 英雄因命运或缺陷而失败的故事。
examples_json: [{"en":"Greek tragedies often told of heroes who fell from grace.","zh":"希腊悲剧常讲述英雄失势的故事。"}]
[{"en":"No hero could escape their destiny.","zh":"没有英雄能逃脱自己的命运。"}]

description: 复杂的迷宫，关着牛头怪。
examples_json: [{"en":"Theseus entered the labyrinth to fight the Minotaur.","zh":"忒修斯进入迷宫与牛头怪战斗。"}]

description: 希腊与特洛伊的十年战争。
examples_json: [{"en":"The Trojan War lasted for ten years.","zh":"特洛伊战争持续了十年。"}]
[{"en":"Achilles was the greatest warrior of the Greeks.","zh":"阿喀琉斯是希腊最伟大的战士。"}]

description: 希腊人用来攻入特洛伊城的木马计。
examples_json: [{"en":"The Greeks hid inside the Trojan Horse.","zh":"希腊人藏在特洛伊木马中。"}]

description: 引发特洛伊战争的美女。
examples_json: [{"en":"Helen of Troy was said to be the most beautiful woman.","zh":"特洛伊的海伦据说是最美的女人。"}]
[{"en":"The Greeks laid siege to Troy for ten years.","zh":"希腊人围攻特洛伊十年。"}]
[{"en":"The greatest warriors fought at Troy.","zh":"最伟大的战士在特洛伊战斗。"}]
[{"en":"The warrior raised his shield to block the attack.","zh":"战士举起盾牌挡住攻击。"}]

description: 古希腊诗人，著有《伊利亚特》。
examples_json: [{"en":"Homer wrote the Iliad about the Trojan War.","zh":"荷马写了关于特洛伊战争的《伊利亚特》。"}]

description: 北欧神话中的众神之父。
examples_json: [{"en":"Odin sacrificed an eye for wisdom.","zh":"奥丁为智慧牺牲了一只眼睛。"}]
[{"en":"Thor wielded the mighty hammer Mjolnir.","zh":"雷神索尔挥舞着强大的雷神之锤。"}]
[{"en":"Asgard was the home of the Norse gods.","zh":"阿斯加德是北欧众神的家园。"}]
[{"en":"Fallen warriors hoped to enter Valhalla.","zh":"战死的勇士希望能进入英灵殿。"}]

description: 北欧神话中的末日之战。
examples_json: [{"en":"Ragnarok was the prophesied end of the world.","zh":"诸神黄昏是预言中的世界末日。"}]
[{"en":"Loki was the trickster god who caused trouble.","zh":"洛基是制造麻烦的诡计之神。"}]
[{"en":"The giants were the enemies of the gods.","zh":"巨人是众神的敌人。"}]
[{"en":"The Valkyries chose warriors to go to Valhalla.","zh":"女武神选择勇士进入英灵殿。"}]

description: 连接北欧神话九界的大树。
examples_json: [{"en":"Yggdrasil connected all nine worlds.","zh":"世界树连接了所有九个世界。"}]
[{"en":"Humans lived in Midgard, the middle world.","zh":"人类住在中庭，中间的世界。"}]
[{"en":"The giants lived in the frozen land of Jotunheim.","zh":"巨人住在冰封的约顿海姆。"}]

description: 连接阿斯加德和中庭的彩虹桥。
examples_json: [{"en":"Heimdall guarded the Bifrost bridge.","zh":"海姆达尔守护着彩虹桥。"}]
[{"en":"Dwarves forged mighty weapons for the gods.","zh":"矮人为众神锻造强大的武器。"}]

description: 住在光之世界的美丽生物。
examples_json: [{"en":"The light elves lived in Alfheim.","zh":"光之精灵住在亚尔夫海姆。"}]

description: 与宇宙和世界结构相关的。
examples_json: [{"en":"Norse mythology describes a cosmic tree of life.","zh":"北欧神话描述了一棵宇宙生命树。"}]

description: 一种存在的世界或领域。
examples_json: [{"en":"Each realm had its own unique inhabitants.","zh":"每个领域都有自己独特的居民。"}]

description: 中国神话中开天辟地的巨人。
examples_json: [{"en":"Pangu separated heaven and earth with his axe.","zh":"盘古用斧头分开了天地。"}]

description: 中国神话中造人和补天的女神。
examples_json: [{"en":"Nuwa created humans from clay.","zh":"女娲用泥土造人。"}]
[{"en":"Creation myths explain how the world began.","zh":"创世神话解释世界如何开始。"}]

description: 神话中神的居所和上方世界。
examples_json: [{"en":"In Chinese myth, heaven and earth were once one.","zh":"在中国神话中，天地曾是一体。"}]
[{"en":"In the beginning, there was only chaos.","zh":"起初只有混沌。"}]

description: 许多创世神话中的原始形态。
examples_json: [{"en":"Pangu was born from a cosmic egg.","zh":"盘古从宇宙蛋中诞生。"}]
[{"en":"Nuwa used pillars to hold up the sky.","zh":"女娲用柱子撑起天。"}]
[{"en":"These mythical stories have been told for centuries.","zh":"这些神话故事已经流传了几个世纪。"}]

description: 日本神话中的创世男神。
examples_json: [{"en":"Izanagi and Izanami created the islands of Japan.","zh":"伊邪那岐和伊邪那美创造了日本列岛。"}]

description: 日本神话中的太阳女神。
examples_json: [{"en":"Amaterasu is the sun goddess in Japanese mythology.","zh":"天照大神是日本神话中的太阳女神。"}]
[{"en":"In Japan, kami are spirits found in nature.","zh":"在日本，神是存在于自然中的灵。"}]

description: 神话中常出现的大海浪。
examples_json: [{"en":"The god of the sea could cause terrible tsunamis.","zh":"海神可以引发可怕的海啸。"}]

description: 与神相关的，不可侵犯的。
examples_json: [{"en":"Mount Fuji is considered a sacred mountain.","zh":"富士山被认为是一座圣山。"}]

description: 日本神话中的重要神器。
examples_json: [{"en":"The sacred mirror was one of Japan's three treasures.","zh":"神镜是日本三神器之一。"}]
[{"en":"Japanese dragons are often associated with water.","zh":"日本的龙常与水相关联。"}]
[{"en":"People visit shrines to pray to the kami.","zh":"人们去神社向神灵祈祷。"}]
